qa_pairs.question: What function is used to notify all threads waiting on a condition variable in pthreads?
qa_pairs.answer: In pthreads, <tt>pthread_cond_broadcast</tt> is used to notify all waiting threads that a condition is satisfied.

qa_pairs.question: How does <tt>pthread_cond_signal</tt> behave when multiple threads are waiting on a condition variable?
qa_pairs.answer: If <tt>pthread_cond_signal</tt> is used when several threads are waiting on a condition variable, a single waiting thread, chosen at random, will be notified that the condition is satisfied, while the others continue to wait.

qa_pairs.question: When would you use <tt>pthread_cond_broadcast</tt> instead of <tt>pthread_cond_signal</tt>?
qa_pairs.answer: <tt>pthread_cond_broadcast</tt> should be used instead of <tt>pthread_cond_signal</tt> when there are several threads waiting on a condition variable and you need to notify all of them that the condition is satisfied.
